role: Senior Data Analytics Engineer - Data Insights

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: reliable data models and pipelines; best practices; quality
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: emphasis on reliability and best practices with no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Internal data platform for SaaS—low risk without commercial/financial/compliance framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: constructing company-wide data asset from ground up; building from scratch
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Early: "ground up" and "from ground up data sources" indicate greenfield data infrastructure build.
evidence.jd_authorship: constructing and activating Appfire's company-wide data asset (Snowflake); Architecting reliable data models and pipelines using DBT; Designing metrics and dimensions for self-service analytics
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (Snowflake, dbt, Python) and concrete deliverables (metrics, pipelines) show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on internal data infrastructure and enabling self-service analytics for business teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: Collaborating; Architecting; Designing; Establishing best practices
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: collaboration and support-oriented language without strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data reliability is named but without explicit testing framework or ownership verb.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational reliability is a concern but not compliance/risk-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: constructing and activating company-wide data asset from ground up; building from scratch
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Greenfield: explicit 'from ground up' signals building data infrastructure from scratch.
evidence.work_arrangement: Spain (fully remote within Spain, with optional Bilbao office access)
